text: 3. This Subcontract is for the entirety of the scope of work set forth in this agreement and as per the Project Construction documents (plans and specifications). Any quantities, assumptions, clarifications, exclusions, terms or conditions indicated in Subcontractor's proposal will not be considered as a limitation of the work that Subcontractor is herein obligated to perform (furnish and properly install) for a complete application. Subcontractor acknowledge this obligation by executing this agreement.
